meaning: int.呼!(表示激动,高兴,轻蔑,赞同等)
examples: Schulman is a little tired of the hoo-ha about the all-women team.
He shouted, "Hoo-rah Minn-e-so-tah!" This was the first organized shout, or "yell".
We all have vices, we all have demons, the world is unfair, boo hoo.
After a diplomatic hoo-ha, these were found to be legal purchases by Yemen's government.
